title: picea alba
intro: Picea alba, also known as White Spruce, is a coniferous tree species native to North America. The medicinal properties of Picea alba include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Picea alba include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Picea alba can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
